name: lost-found-campus-app
description: Full-stack Lost & Found Web Application for College Campus

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.vercel-build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
